title: README is concise and viewer-first
summary: The root README was reduced from a long text heavy launch document to a concise product README that leads with the Kage Memory Terminal viewer, quick install, Codex/Claude setup, core commands, memory model, proof metric
body:
The root README was reduced from a long text-heavy launch document to a concise product README that leads with the Kage Memory Terminal viewer, quick install, Codex/Claude setup, core commands, memory model, proof metrics, and trust model. Future README edits should keep viewer proof visible near the top and avoid repeating setup/product details in multiple sections.
Evidence: README now includes docs/assets/kage-viewer.svg and is organized around Install, Viewer, Codex And Claude Code, Core Commands, What Kage Stores, Proof, and Trust Model.
Verified by: README scan
